svg.aria-label: March 2026 security digest monthly index covering 27 daily digests across four weeks : GlassWorm supply chain GitHub token theft, Trivy CI/CD breach with 47 poisoned npm packages, Cisco FMC zero-day CVE-2026-20122, LiteLLM backdoor, AI agent prompt injection and sandbox DNS exfiltration, Gentlemen ransomware, DPRK IT worker sanctions, Kubernetes RBAC and AWS IAM Zero Trust.
svg.title: 2026-03 Monthly Index: GlassWorm supply chain, Cisco FMC 0-day, AI agent threats

g.text: Trivy CI/CD breach : 47 npm packages poisoned
Cisco FMC + Chrome 0-day + Oracle RCE : patch fast
AI sandbox DNS exfil : prompt injection : K8s RBAC
